---
title: "Getting Help"
---

## During the course

- Ask your instructor or teaching assistants
- Use the course chat/forum if available

## Julia-specific questions

- [Julia Discourse](https://discourse.julialang.org/) — friendly community forum
- [Julia Slack](https://julialang.org/slack/) — real-time chat
- [Julia documentation](https://docs.julialang.org/) — official language reference

## Probabilistic programming

- [Turing.jl documentation](https://turinglang.org/stable/) — the probabilistic programming framework used throughout this course
- [Turing.jl tutorials](https://turinglang.org/stable/tutorials/) — worked examples covering a range of models

## Differential equations

- [DifferentialEquations.jl documentation](https://docs.sciml.ai/DiffEqDocs/stable/) — the ODE solver ecosystem used in this course
- [SciML tutorials](https://docs.sciml.ai/Overview/stable/) — broader scientific machine learning resources

## Course issues

- [Report a bug or suggest an improvement](https://github.com/sbfnk/mfiidd.julia/issues)
- [Discussion board](https://github.com/sbfnk/mfiidd.julia/discussions)
